text: I feel as though I am stepping into a space dedicated to inquiry and reflection. The first room, quiet with its glass walls and muted lighting, evokes anticipation—a sense of crossing a threshold. Moving into the vivid exhibit, I am surrounded by bold letters and stimulating visuals, the text before me acknowledging obscurity and confusion, echoing my own sense of searching for clarity in a mediated, technological world. I am reminded of how easy it is to lose sight of what's real—yet inside, there is a flicker of excitement, as if I stand on the edge of discovery.
